articles.title: Launching Health in ChatGPT
articles.summary: Health in ChatGPT now lets eligible U.S. users securely connect medical records and Apple Health to get more personalized insights and better understand their health.

articles.title: Accelerating the frontiers of scientific discovery: Google’s $40M commitment to the Genesis Mission
articles.summary: Google commits $40M in AI tokens and credits for the Genesis Mission

articles.title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
articles.summary: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.

articles.title: How news organizations are using AI to advance their vital missions
articles.summary: News organizations are using AI to strengthen reporting, grow audiences, and improve business operations, with OpenAI tools supporting journalists and publishers worldwide.

articles.title: Advancing the next era of national science
articles.summary: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.

articles.title: Introducing OpenAI Presence
articles.summary: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.

articles.title: The Anthropic Economic Index connector
articles.summary: We're launching the Anthropic Economic Index connector for Claude, which lets anyone explore the data directly.

articles.title: Supporting ambitious external research through the Anthropic Economic Futures Research Fund
articles.summary: We’re committing $200 million to the Anthropic Economic Futures Research Fund to support ambitious external research.

articles.title: Donating another $20 million to Public First Action
articles.summary: Anthropic is contributing an additional $20 million to Public First Action, bringing our total support to $40 million.
